title: service-accounts — permissions
description: Every permission on this table is scoped to the `platform_admin` guard. The tenant-audience `sanctum` guard NEVER interacts with SA rows directly. See policies.json for the enforcement layer + boundary_note. Seeded roles reuse the platform-user baseline (super_admin, security, ops, dpo) — no new roles introduced here.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.viewAny
permissions.description: List SAs. Redacted list — no secret material, no last_used_ip.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.view
permissions.description: Show one SA. Includes signer_kid + expiry + status. No secret material.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.view.audit_trail
permissions.description: Read the audit-usage report (usage histogram, IP-tuple diversity, jti-reuse detections, last 100 audit rows).

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.create
permissions.description: Provision a new SA. Requires --reason. Returns the plaintext secret ONCE.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.update
permissions.description: Update mutable fields (name, description, is_enabled, expires_at, metadata). application_id + tenant_id + signer_kid are immutable regardless of this permission.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.rotate
permissions.description: Rotate the SA secret. Returns the plaintext new secret ONCE.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.disable
permissions.description: Set is_enabled=false. Existing JWTs remain valid until natural expiry.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.enable
permissions.description: Set is_enabled=true. Refuses when expires_at has elapsed.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete. Starts the retention hold clock. Actual hard-delete via PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.issue_test_jwt
permissions.description: Issue a test JWT for troubleshooting. Uses `service-account:test-jwt` command OR the /issue-jwt HTTP endpoint. Every issue is audit-logged.

permissions.name: platform.service_accounts.view.metadata
permissions.description: Read the SA's metadata JSONB (IP allowlist, ops notes, deployment hints). Metadata may contain sensitive integration details; separate permission from view.
